title: Rolson 21046 150mm Combination Plier
features: Hardened & tempered for additional strength and durability
The jaws & cutting edges are induction hardened for efficient and precise cutting & gripping
Heavy-duty & two-tone soft-grip handle for comfort and better grip
Handles complete with collars to prevent damage to knuckles
description: From the manufacturer About Us Rolson Tools continually look to bring you new innovative products, all at the very best possible margins and this year is no different. To date, we have over 250 new exciting and innovative products to whet your appetite, together with a host of new in-store packaging and point-of-sale material. All designed with impact and shelf appeal!. The Rolson marketing team have sought innovative ways to package our new and existing lines. We bring promotional product combinations that offer originality and a unique sales offering. Description Manufactured from Carbon steel Hardened & tempered for additional strength and durability The jaws & cutting edges are induction hardened for efficient and precise cutting & gripping Heavy-duty & two-tone soft-grip handle for comfort and better grip
